title: Low-Altitude Urban Air Mobility (UAM) Event Taxonomy
description: Systematic event classification for multi-modal UAM dataset generation. Derived from NASA Belcastro et al. (2017) 4-domain hazard taxonomy, cross-validated with CAAC MinGui [2025] No.15 (14 emergency + 35 non-emergency event types), JARUS SORA v2.5 (SAIL I-VI), and ICAO CICTT ADREP (34 occurrence categories). Organized by UAM-adapted PEGASUS 6-layer ODD model.

methodology.primary_framework: NASA Belcastro et al. (2017) — 4-domain UAS hazard taxonomy (Vehicle, GCS, Operations, UTM), 31 sub-categories
methodology.coverage_validation: CAAC MinGui [2025] No.15 — 14 emergency + 35 non-emergency reportable event types
methodology.severity_framework: JARUS SORA v2.5 — SAIL I-VI mapped to critical/major/minor
methodology.naming_convention: ICAO CICTT ADREP — 34 occurrence category codes for naming alignment
methodology.odd_model: PEGASUS 6-layer model (Scholtes et al., 2021, IEEE Access), adapted for UAM by the authors
methodology.event_type_derivation: Belcastro 31 sub-classes filtered for low-altitude urban UAM relevance + 6 ground-domain types validated via CAAC cross-reference

L1.name: Airspace Structure
L1.description: Flight corridors, altitude layers, no-fly zones, approach/departure paths

L2.name: Ground Infrastructure
L2.description: Landing pads, charging stations, communication towers, traffic signals

L3.name: Dynamic Constraints
L3.description: Temporary flight restrictions, construction zones, emergency isolation areas

L5.name: Environment
L5.description: Rain, fog, wind, temperature, lighting, visibility

L6.name: Digital Layer
L6.description: C2 links, GNSS, UTM data exchange, V2X communication

collision.label: Collision/Near-Miss
collision.description: Events involving physical or near-physical interaction between agents

failure.label: System/Component Failure
failure.description: Events caused by malfunction or degradation of technical systems

environmental.label: Environmental Trigger
environmental.description: Events triggered or amplified by environmental conditions

violation.label: Spatial/Regulatory Violation
violation.description: Events involving airspace or operational boundary violations

operational.label: Operational Anomaly
operational.description: Events requiring operational response or procedural intervention

event_types.name: UAV Geofence Violation
event_types.description: UAV enters a designated no-fly zone due to navigation error, triggering autonomous return-to-home or forced landing.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: NAV error → position drift → geofence boundary crossing → RTH activation → mission abort

event_types.name: UAV Altitude Deviation
event_types.description: UAV deviates from assigned altitude corridor, creating potential conflict with other airspace users.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: altitude control error → corridor deviation → conflict alert → corrective maneuver

event_types.name: Non-Cooperative UAV Intrusion
event_types.description: An unauthorized UAV enters operational airspace, creating collision risk with cooperative UAVs.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: intruder detection → threat assessment → evasive maneuver / forced landing → airspace lock

event_types.name: Airspace Corridor Congestion
event_types.description: Multiple UAVs simultaneously request passage through a narrow corridor, exceeding capacity.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: demand spike → corridor saturation → queue formation → priority arbitration → sequential passage

variants.name: Severe congestion, one UAV forced to divert

event_types.name: Communication Station Failure
event_types.description: A ground communication base station fails, degrading C2 link quality for UAVs in its coverage area.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: base station power loss → C2 signal degradation → UAV switches to backup link → reduced operational bandwidth

variants.name: Cascading station failure, widespread link loss

event_types.name: GNSS Signal Degradation
event_types.caac_ref: CAAC-4 related (obstacle strike due to nav error)
event_types.description: GPS/GNSS signal quality degrades in urban canyon, causing UAV position estimate to drift.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: urban canyon multipath → GNSS error growth → position uncertainty → degraded navigation → potential geofence breach

variants.name: Gradual multipath degradation in urban canyon

event_types.name: Charging Station Unavailable
event_types.description: Planned charging station is occupied or out of service, requiring UAV to divert to alternative.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: charger occupied/failed → charging request denied → search for alternative → battery critical → emergency divert

event_types.name: Landing Pad Contention
event_types.caac_ref: CAAC-12 related (emergency response at landing site)
event_types.description: Multiple UAVs request the same landing pad simultaneously, requiring priority-based conflict resolution.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: simultaneous landing requests → pad contention → priority assessment → one holds, one lands

event_types.name: Traffic Signal Malfunction
event_types.belcastro_ref: Ground domain (beyond Belcastro scope, CAAC cross-validated)
event_types.description: Traffic light at intersection fails (all red / all off), causing ground traffic flow disruption.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: signal fault → traffic flow breakdown → vehicle queue → potential conflict → UAV overhead monitoring

variants.name: Signal all-red, vehicles stop, UAV monitors

event_types.name: Road Construction Detour
event_types.description: Temporary road construction forces vehicles to detour, creating unusual traffic patterns.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: construction setup → lane closure → vehicle detour → traffic congestion → delayed emergency response

event_types.name: Temporary No-Fly Zone Activation
event_types.description: An emergency no-fly zone is activated mid-operation, forcing UAVs in the area to immediately exit or land.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: ground incident → TFR activation → zone broadcast → UAVs within zone → forced exit or immediate landing

variants.name: Immediate TFR, UAV must emergency land

event_types.name: Emergency Isolation Zone
event_types.description: A hazard zone is established around an incident site, requiring all agents to avoid the area.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: incident (fire/leak/crash) → hazard zone defined → perimeter broadcast → agents reroute → emergency responders enter

event_types.name: UAV-UAV Airspace Conflict
event_types.belcastro_ref: Vehicle:Loss of Control + UTM:Traffic Management Coordination Failures
event_types.description: Two UAVs on intersecting flight paths trigger a conflict alert, requiring evasive action.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: trajectory prediction → conflict detection → alert generation → evasive maneuver → separation restored

event_types.name: UAV Building/Structure Strike
event_types.description: UAV collides with a building or structure due to navigation error or loss of control.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: navigation error / control failure → trajectory toward building → last-moment avoidance fails → impact → debris

event_types.name: UAV Forced Landing in Populated Area
event_types.belcastro_ref: Vehicle:Propulsion System Failures + Vehicle:Power System Failures
event_types.caac_ref: CAAC-2 (crash or forced landing), CAAC-14 (death or serious injury)
event_types.description: UAV suffers total propulsion failure and must execute emergency landing over a populated area.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: motor failure → altitude loss → forced landing site selection → descent → ground impact → pedestrian avoidance

event_types.name: UAV-Ground Vehicle Collision
event_types.description: UAV impacts a ground vehicle, either from low-altitude flight or falling debris.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: UAV low altitude / descent → vehicle in path → impact → vehicle damage / traffic disruption → emergency response

variants.name: UAV debris falls on parked vehicle

event_types.name: UAV-Pedestrian Near-Miss/Interaction
event_types.description: UAV comes dangerously close to a pedestrian, either from trajectory error or forced descent.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: UAV trajectory deviation → pedestrian in path → proximity alert → evasive action or impact → injury assessment

event_types.name: Pedestrian-Vehicle Conflict
event_types.description: Pedestrian jaywalks or vehicle fails to yield, resulting in conflict requiring emergency braking.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: pedestrian enters roadway → vehicle approaches → conflict detection → emergency brake → near-miss / minor impact

variants.name: Vehicle runs red light, pedestrian jumps back

event_types.name: Pedestrian Fall / Medical Emergency
event_types.description: Elderly pedestrian falls on crossing or person has medical emergency, requiring UAV detection and emergency response dispatch.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: pedestrian falls → UAV overhead detects → alert generation → emergency dispatch → responder arrival → assistance

variants.name: Elderly fall on wet crossing, UAV detects
Sudden cardiac event, passerby alerts, UAV confirms

event_types.name: Crowd Gathering / Evacuation
event_types.description: Crowd gathers at public space or evacuates after an incident, changing ground risk profile for UAV operations.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: trigger event → crowd formation/dispersal → density change → ground risk reassessment → UAV operational adjustment

variants.name: Crowd gathering at metro exit, UAV monitors

event_types.name: Ground Vehicle Collision
event_types.description: Two vehicles collide at intersection, blocking traffic and requiring emergency response.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: signal violation / brake failure → collision → road blockage → traffic buildup → emergency dispatch → UAV overhead assessment

variants.name: T-bone collision at intersection, full blockage

event_types.name: Emergency Vehicle Priority Passage
event_types.description: Ambulance or fire truck navigates through congested traffic, requiring other vehicles to yield and UAV to coordinate airspace priority.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: emergency call → dispatch → route planning → traffic yielding → corridor clearing → UAV airspace priority → arrival

variants.name: Fire truck wrong-way through blocked intersection

event_types.name: Vehicle Breakdown Blocking Road
event_types.description: Autonomous vehicle suffers sensor failure or runs out of fuel, stopping in lane and blocking traffic.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: sensor fault / fuel exhaustion → vehicle stops → lane blocked → following vehicles brake → traffic wave → UAV detects and reports

variants.name: AV sensor failure, safe stop in lane
Vehicle out of fuel, blocks arterial road

event_types.name: Rain Transition (Gradual / Sudden)
event_types.description: Rain intensity changes, affecting visibility, UAV performance, ground traction, and pedestrian behavior.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: rain onset → visibility decrease → UAV divert/RTH → ground wetness → pedestrian slip risk → traffic slowdown

variants.name: Light rain gradually increasing to moderate
Sudden heavy downpour, immediate UAV grounding
Rain stops, wet ground + post-rain recovery

event_types.name: Fog Onset / Low Visibility
event_types.description: Sudden fog bank reduces visibility below operational minimums, forcing UAVs to switch to instrument-only navigation.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: fog formation → visibility drop → visual sensors degraded → instrument navigation → speed reduction → potential obstacle hazard

variants.name: Sudden fog bank, immediate visibility loss

event_types.name: High Wind / Gust Event
event_types.description: Wind speed exceeds UAV operational limits, causing attitude instability and potential loss of control.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: wind increase → UAV attitude deviation → stability compensation → exceed control authority → emergency descent

variants.name: Steady crosswind, UAV compensates with drift
Sudden gust, payload swing, loss of stability

event_types.name: Lighting Condition Change
event_types.description: Rapid lighting change (dusk/night or tunnel entry) degrades visual sensor performance.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: lighting change → camera exposure adjustment → temporary blindness → reduced detection range → slower speed

event_types.name: Extreme Temperature Event
event_types.caac_ref: CAAC-8 related (battery/power failure due to temperature)
event_types.description: Extreme temperature causes battery performance degradation or sensor malfunction.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: temperature extreme → battery internal resistance change → reduced endurance → early RTH → mission incomplete

variants.name: High temperature, battery derating, shortened mission

event_types.name: C2 Link Complete Loss
event_types.belcastro_ref: Vehicle:Communication System Failures + GCS:Command and Control Link Loss
event_types.description: UAV loses all C2 communication with ground station, triggering autonomous lost-link procedure.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: C2 signal loss → lost-link timer start → autonomous mode → pre-programmed RTH → attempt reconnection → land if no recovery

variants.name: Link loss, successful RTH and landing
Prolonged link loss, forced landing at alternate site

event_types.name: C2 Link Intermittent Degradation
event_types.description: C2 link suffers high latency and packet loss, degrading control quality but not triggering lost-link procedure.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: signal interference → increased latency → control lag → trajectory oscillation → operator switches to higher power mode

event_types.name: GNSS Spoofing Attack
event_types.belcastro_ref: UTM:Security Threats + Vehicle:Navigation and Guidance Errors
event_types.caac_ref: CAAC-8 related (navigation system failure due to external attack)
event_types.description: Malicious GNSS spoofing causes UAV to follow false position, potentially hijacking its trajectory.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: spoofing signal → false position fix → autopilot follows false track → geofence approach → anomaly detection → countermeasure

event_types.name: Communication Jamming
event_types.description: Intentional RF jamming disrupts C2 and/or V2X communication in the operational area.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: jammer activated → noise floor increase → SNR degradation → multiple UAVs affected → frequency hopping → some links recovered

variants.name: Wideband jamming, all UAVs in area affected

event_types.name: Ground Control Station Compromise
event_types.description: Cyber attacker gains unauthorized access to GCS, potentially issuing malicious commands to UAVs.
event_types.causal_chain_sketch: GCS breach → unauthorized commands → anomalous UAV behavior → operator override fails → safety lockout activates

variants.name: GCS breach detected, safety lockout succeeds

CAAC-1.coverage: Not directly simulated (no manned aircraft in low-altitude UAM ODD). Covered by L4-1 (UAV-UAV conflict) as methodological analog.

CAAC-2.description: Mid-air collision, crash, or forced landing

CAAC-7.coverage: L4-3 related (battery fire as propulsion failure consequence)

CAAC-8.coverage: L4-3 (propulsion failure), L6-1 (link loss → autonomous landing)

CAAC-14.coverage: L4-3 (forced landing in crowd), L4-5 (pedestrian impact), L4-6 (pedestrian-vehicle)
